question.zh: SURF 在局部特征匹配中为什么有价值？
question.en: Why was SURF valued in local feature matching?

options.zh: 它让稳健特征检测更快
options.en: It made robust feature detection faster

explanation.zh: SURF 使用积分图等思想，加速稳健局部特征检测与描述。
explanation.en: SURF uses ideas such as integral images to speed up robust local feature detection and description.
